text.message: Yeah it doesnt come out well Scott, but no worries
but a good amount of people do what Josh said and join via their phone
What Washington tournament did you play in Scott?
or are you one of my Portland players
I qualified already so I wanna help out for this norwescon
I ended up with a choice, Deaf or Mute
and trying to change means I am completley distracted now
and being distracted has already made a mess for me'
I dig my hole and will live in it this time
still getting familiar with trading on colinist.
I hit wrong button at the wrong time
looks like I have to change settings between games
and colonist ahd been nice so that I can try different strategies  quickly
something I can't do with my infrequent games with family
I think last 2 tournaments you were at you barely missed finals
I'm ok with brick...at this moment
What do you need for longest road
why did u not take road?
green is on 9 open settle scot
hopefully I can vet a 10 for wood
